clauses.title: Eligibility Age Requirement
clauses.text: Youth referred to residents aged 19 to 34.

clauses.title: Required Documents for Survey
clauses.text: The city could request survey documents and department submission files for the youth plan.

clauses.title: Plan Publication Deadline
clauses.text: The annual youth plan was published by March 31.

clauses.title: Support Amount Standard
clauses.text: Support amount standards for youth projects followed the annual plan.
